data.current_description: Retrieve data for a specific time-series dataset. Returns observations with date and value columns.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve time-series observations for a specific dataset identified by database and dataset codes. Supports date range filtering, column selection, sorting, and data transformations. Returns paginated results with date-indexed numeric values. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks detail about key input parameters (date filtering, column selection, transformations) and pagination behavior. data.current_summary: Get time-series data and metadata combined
data.current_description: Retrieve both data and metadata for a specific time-series dataset in a single call. CSV format is not available for this endpoint.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve time-series data with metadata in single call
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve both time-series observations and metadata for a specific dataset in a single request. Supports date range filtering, column selection, and sorting. Returns combined data and metadata response. CSV format is not supported; use JSON or XML. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is wordy. Description lacks input parameter details (filtering, sorting capabilities) and output structure clarity. data.current_description: Download all data from a time-series database as a zipped CSV file. Available for premium data products only.
data.summary_suggestion: Download complete time-series database as zipped CSV
data.description_suggestion: Download all time-series data from a specified database as a single zipped CSV file. Returns a compressed archive containing the complete dataset. Available only for premium data products. Requires API key authentication and appropriate subscription level. Large downloads may take time to process.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on output format details, authentication requirements, and potential processing time. Enhanced summary to be more specific about output format. data.description_suggestion: Retrieve data from a Nasdaq Data Link table with optional row and column filtering. Supports pagination with default page size of 10,000 rows.
